title: [skip-ci] GHA: Closed issue/PR comment-lock
body:
Lock discussions on closed PRs and Issues after 90-days of inactivity.

Ref:
     https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/19012
and
     https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19691
and
     https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19700

comments.body:
Note: Leaving this marked draft on purpose:
* In case it's not needed on this repo, just close it.
* Otherwise, let's make sure https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4991 functions first (since it needs to be merged to be tested).

FWIW I don’t care strongly either way — comments on old closed issues are fairly rare here, IIRC (certainly compared to some Podman issues).

I think just being consistent with the other repos is the decisive factor, and a reason to enable this.

> I think just being consistent with the other repos is the decisive factor, and a reason to enable this.

Thanks for the feedback, yeah that's a good point.  Still, let's make sure the workflow-reuse call works on buildah first.  It's really easy to screw these things up, and unhelpful there's no way to test it in a PR :disappointed:
Force-push: Rebased & Added necessary permissions fix.  [Confirmed job is working in buildah repo.](https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5002)
@cevich is this ready to go in?
Oh my bad, I thought this went in.  Yep it's ready to go.
